buildCmd: cd frontend && npx vite build && cp dist/assets/index-*.css dist/ds-styles.css

dtsPropsFor.PaymentReceipt: /** No props — renders a transfer receipt from the transaction store. */
dtsPropsFor.ListGroup:
/** Menu items; each navigates to its Route on click. */
  items: { Name: string; Route: string }[];
dtsPropsFor.SuccessfulTransferModal: /** No props — reads the transaction store; navigates on action. */
dtsPropsFor.FailedTransferModal:
/** Error message shown to the user. */
  errorMsg: string;
dtsPropsFor.HistoryFilterModal: /** No props — reads/writes the transaction-history filter store. */
